titleStmt.title: SII 23.386: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 386. (A.R. No. 386 of 1907.) Maruttuvakkuḍi, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Airāvatēśvara temple—on the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa III: year 39: 1215-16 A.D.

summary.p: The king is called Tribhuvanavīradēva ‘who took Madurai, Īḻam (and Karuvūr) and the crowned head of the Pāṇḍya, and performed the anointment (of heroes and victors).’ The inscription is much damaged in the first half. It seems to register an endowment of land by one Tirunaṭṭapperumāṉ a resident of Āṉaichchūḻ in Tiraimūr-nāḍu a division of Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu for the requirements of worship, both daily and special, to god Tiruveṇkāḍuḍaiyār consecrated by the donor in the western portion of the first prākāra in the temple of Tiruviḍaikkuḷamuḍaiyār at the place. This seems to have been added to two vēli of land at Dānavinōdanallūr presented to the main temple in the 25th year of the king by Arayaṉ Ediriliśōḻar alias Śōḻiyavaraiyar of Pālaivayal under the name Śōḻiyavaraiyarkuḍikkāḍu and supplemented by the latter with another gift of one vēli of land in the next year. It is not clear why there was an interval of 14 years between the gift and its recording on stone.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyu
m Ī ṇṭu pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭi
Ābhiṣekamum paṇṇiyaruḷiṉa śrītiripuvaṉaviratevar
kku yāṇṭu 3 10 9 muppattoṉpatāvatu Uyyak
koṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭut tiraimurnāṭṭu Āṉaiccū
ḻ ṭaiyāṉ tirunaṭṭapperumā
ṉeṉ Āṉaiccūḻuṭaiyār tiruviṭaikkuḷamuṭaiyār
koyilil mutal pirākārattu melait tirunaṭaimāḷikai
ṭaiyārtiruve
ṇkāṭuṭaiyārkku pūjaikku Āṉaiccūḻil Eṉ kāṇi
yāṉa nilattile tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka Irupa
ttaiñcāvatu nāḷile nirvārttu nilamum viṭṭu
pūjaiyum ceṉṟuvarac ceyte yārtiruvi
ṭaikkuḷamuṭaiyārkku niṅkalukkuṭalāka
ttamum paḷḷiccantattile māṟi tāṉaviṉotanallū
ruṭaṉe kūṭṭakkaṭavatākap pālaivāyiluṭai
yār Arayaṉ Etirilicoḻarāṉa coḻiyavaraiyar vi
ṇṇappañceytu kūṭṭiṉa nilam Iruvelik kuṭalāka
Uṭaiyār tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyārkkut tirunāmattuk
kāṇiyāka
coḻiyavaraiyar kuṭikkāṭeṉṟu perkūva
ṭalāka nikku l E ṇṇiyar maṉai
maiccoḻavatikku kaṭava
kku vaṭakkum tevatāṉam viṉotanallūr nilattukkuk kiḻakkum
Uyyakkoṇṭāṉvāykkālukku teṟkum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam I
Innilam Araiye Orumāvarai muntirikaikkum Aṭaimutal varicai
ppaṭi nellu Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaikkuḷamuṭaiyār śrīpaṇṭārattuṭa
ṉe kūṭṭikkoṇṭu Uṭaiyār tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyārkku nāḷ
Oṉṟukkuk kāveriāṟṟil tirumañcaṉanir kalamum Elam Araicce
viṭum tirumeṟpūccu mākāṇippalamum citāri Araikkāṟ palamum tiruppaḷ
ḷitāmam Uḷḷiṭṭaṉavum tirupparicaṭṭam Uru muṉṟum tiruvamutukku Arici ku
ṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyum kaṟiyamutu kkum carkkarai I
rupattu nāṟpalamum Uppu Āḻākkum miḷaku Oṉṟekāṟ ceviṭum ney
Oṉṟekāṟ ceviṭum Aṭaikkāyamutu pākkup paṉṉiraṇṭum
Ilaiyamutu paṟṟu Āṟumāvum santiviḷakkup pattukku Eṇ
ṇai Uḻakkum caṉieṇṇaik kāppukkuc caṉioṉṟukku Eṇṇai Āḻākkum
ppukkaḷum viṣu Ayaṉacaṅkiramaṅkaḷum Āṭṭait tirunāḷ Uḷḷiṭṭa ci
ṟappukkaḷukkum paṭikkuppa cellavum Ippaṭiyāl ve
ṇṭuvatu nikki nikki Uḷḷatu tirumañcaṉattoṭum pā
ppaḷḷittāmattukkum kucavaṉ Uṇṇattāḷi Uḷḷiṭṭut tevai ceyvā
rkkum peṟṟukku veṇṭuvatu Iṭappeṟuvatākavum Ittiruveṇ
kāṭuṭaiyar nāyaṉārkku coḻiyavaraiyar jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭ
ṭuc cempiyaṉ neṟkuppaiyil Irupattāṟāvatu nāḷil tevatāṉam
Iṭuvitta nilam veliyāl Uḷḷa Uṭalum Iṉṉāyaṉārkku pūjaikku Uṭa lāva
tākavum Iṉṉāyaṉāramutu parikalam māṟṟuc coṟṟil paricāraka māṇ Oṉṟukku koyilil
ṉopāti coṟiṭṭu Allātatu nivantaṅkaḷukku Uṭalākavum kal veṭṭittu
Itu māheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 23.386 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
